title: Server-side shopping cart (persistence, add/remove/update, real-time totals)
description: Cart persisted to the database for logged-in users, add/remove/update items with quantity validation, real-time total calculation, synced with the existing Zustand client store.

inScope: Server-side cart storage for logged-in users
Add/remove/update cart items with quantity validation
outOfScope: Guest cart persistence beyond the client-side Zustand store

acceptanceCriteria.text: A logged-in customer's cart persists across sessions
Adding, removing, and updating quantity all reflect correctly in the cart total
Quantity cannot be set below 1 or above a sane validated max
